---
title: "Outro: Advanced dynamic reporting workflows"
subtitle: "Adding automation (make), version control (git), and containerization (Docker)"
author: "Samuel Pawel, Fabio Molo, Gorka Fraga Gonzalez"
preview-links: true
listing: 
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle]
  type: table
  contents: 'slides'
  id: 'slides'
---

<!-- <iframe allowfullscreen class="pdf" src="Advanced_workflows.pdf" width="100%" height="700px" style="border: 2px solid black;"> -->

<!-- </iframe> -->

#### Go to online slides in full screen
